title: Phase 54d: beatoraja-skin 88 missing + 3 stubs
description: Largest gap. BooleanPropertyFactory (20), MainStateAccessor (11), JsonSkinSerializer (10), LR2 loaders (16), Lua utilities (11), others (23).
close_reason: 88% false positives. Of 91 gaps: 87 are architectural redesigns (inner class→closure, abstract→enum, etc.). 7 genuine: MainState stubs (4), SkinTextBitmap (2), LuaSkinLoader.serializeLuaScript (1). MainState stubs are documented Phase 47 items.

title: Phase 54b: BytePCM regression fixes
description: Fix 2 known regressions: float saturation and negative overflow in BytePCM. File: crates/beatoraja-audio/src/pcm.rs
close_reason: Fixed BytePCM float-to-byte conversion: (f * 127.0) as i32 as i8 matches Java truncation semantics. Both overflow and negative overflow tests now pass.

close_reason: Phase 59 complete: sound wiring, MusicSelector events, state transitions

title: Phase 54l: Final verification

title: Implement EventType::Rival — move PlayerInformation to beatoraja-types
description:
EventType::Rival in MusicSelector (select/music_selector.rs:321) cycles through rival players via RivalDataAccessor. Currently blocked because:
- RivalDataAccessor is in beatoraja-core
- PlayerInformation type is in beatoraja-core
- MainControllerAccess (beatoraja-types) cannot expose PlayerInformation

Fix: Move PlayerInformation to beatoraja-types, add get_rival_count/get_rival_information methods to MainControllerAccess trait.

Java reference: EventFactory.java rival event (lines 443-457) — cycles through rivals with modular arithmetic.
close_reason: Moved PlayerInformation to beatoraja-types, added rival methods to MainControllerAccess, implemented EventType::Rival

close_reason: All 7 gaps accounted for: 4 permanent skip (classpath scanning/reflection), 3 false positives (renamed methods: put→put_song, convertXMLToObject→convert_xml_to_ranking).

title: Wire LR2SkinCSVLoader into skin loading pipeline
description:
LR2 CSV skin loaders exist (LR2SelectSkinLoader, LR2PlaySkinLoader, etc.) but their output differs from SkinData (the JSON/Lua loader output type). 3 blocked locations:
- load_skin_config .lr2skin branch (skin/skin_loader.rs:114)
- load_with_config .lr2skin branch (skin/skin_loader.rs:172)
- get_skin_loader returns None (skin/lr2/lr2_skin_csv_loader.rs:425)

Fix: Build a converter from LR2 loader output to the common Skin type, or unify the loading pipeline to accept both formats.

All marked with '// Blocked: LR2 CSV skin loaders exist but ...'.

title: SkinDistributionGraph.prepare: expose selected bar via trait
description:
SkinDistributionGraph.prepare (select/skin_distribution_graph.rs:95) needs the current selected bar from MusicSelector, but the skin MainState trait cannot expose it because the Bar type is in beatoraja-select.

Java: casts (MusicSelector)state to get getSelectedBar().

Fix: Add a method like get_distribution_data() -> Option<(lamps, ranks)> to the skin MainState trait, returning just the data arrays instead of the Bar object.
close_reason: DistributionData struct + MainState.get_distribution_data() + SkinDistributionGraph.prepare implemented. Remaining draw wiring tracked by brs-z2f.

title: Expand SkinDrawable context to carry MainController
description:
TimerOnlyMainState adapter only wraps TimerAccess, so skin objects cannot call change_state, audio_play/stop, set_timer_micro, or execute_event during rendering. 5 no-op items in skin/stubs.rs:
- execute_event (line 119)
- change_state (line 125)
- set_timer_micro (line 176)
- audio_play (line 183)
- audio_stop (line 190)

Fix: Either expand the SkinDrawable trait interface to pass more context (e.g. a SkinRenderContext trait in beatoraja-types), or store MainControllerAccess ref in TimerOnlyMainState.

All marked with '// no-op: TimerOnlyMainState adapter does not carry ...'.
close_reason: SkinRenderContext trait extends TimerAccess with 5 capabilities; SkinDrawable updated. Remaining wgpu rendering tracked by brs-z2f.

title: Add method-level ignore to ast-compare
description: ast-compare currently only supports file-level ignore. Add method-level ignore (ClassName.methodName and TypeName.* patterns) to filter out ~146 false positives. This gives accurate missing method counts.
close_reason: Method-level ignore added: 136 patterns, 170 methods ignored, 90 genuine missing remain

Fix: Use tokio::spawn or restructure to break the async recursion.
close_reason: Fixed: converted schedule_reconnect to sync fn to break async type cycle

title: Resolve circular dependency stubs (modmenu↔select, external↔skin)
description:
4 stubs caused by circular dependencies:
- MusicSelector.get_selected_bar/get_reverse_lookup_data (modmenu/stubs.rs:108,114) — modmenu cannot import select
- IntegerPropertyFactory/BooleanPropertyFactory/StringPropertyFactory (external/stubs.rs:269,289,309) — external uses concrete MainState, skin uses trait MainState

Fix options:
- Move shared types to beatoraja-types
- Use callback/trait pattern to break the cycle
- Merge crates if appropriate

All marked with '// Blocked: circular dependency ...'.
close_reason: SongSelectionAccess trait bridges modmenu↔select; external property factories now delegate to skin's real implementations
